name: NEEWER MS60 LED Video Light Handheld Spotlight
description: The Neewer MS60B Bi-Color LED Monolight is a compact and powerful continuous light source designed for photographers, videographers, and content creators on the go.

features.Key Features:: For Content Creators & Vloggers | Output: 8300 Lux at 3.3' | 2700-6500K; RGB Mode | AC or Battery Power | Onboard & App Control | CRI 97 | TLCI 98 | 17 Preset Special Effects | Fan Cooled | Includes Bowens Adapter & Handle | Includes Reflector & Power Adapter
features.Specifications:: Model: MS60C | Weight: 1.5lb / 700g | Battery Type: NP-F750/F970 | Power Source: Power adapter, AC power | Input Voltage: 100-240V | DC Output: 19.6V/4A | Dimming Range: 0-100% | Color Temperature: 2700K-6500K | Channels: 00-99 | CRI: 97+ | Power: 65W | Illuminance: 41000lux/0.5m, 8300lux/m | Frequency: 1-10 | Number of Special Effects: 17 | GM Values: -50/+50 | Hue Angles: 0-360° | Saturation: 0-100% | R/G/B/C/W: 0-255 | Package Weight: 4.6lb/2.1kg | Package Size: 13.8" x 11.4" x 4.3"/350 x 290 x 110mm
features.What's In the Box?: 1 x MS60C LED Video Light | 1 x Reflector | 1 x Handle | 1 x Power Cable (US Plug) | 1 x Power Adapter | 1 x Battery Plate | 1 x Battery Cable | 1 x V Mount Battery Adapter Plate | 1 x Bowens Mount Adapter
